title: At the Airport
content: Daniel arrived at the airport two hours before his flight. The terminal was crowded with travelers carrying bags and checking departure screens. He checked in his luggage and passed through security without problems. Afterward, he bought a coffee and found a seat near his gate. Around him, people talked in different languages and prepared for their journeys. Daniel enjoyed watching airplanes move across the runway outside. When boarding finally began, he gathered his belongings and joined the line. He was ready to begin his vacation after months of planning.
